name: Auth Bypass Exploit
description:
PREVIEW: A critical authentication bypass vulnerability that allows unauthorized access to admin endpoints. Can you identify the token validation flaw?
FULL: The auth.js middleware fails to verify the 'exp' (expiration) claim on incoming JWTs, allowing expired tokens to be reused indefinitely for admin access.

languageVersions.JavaScript: Fix the JWT validation middleware in auth.js
languageVersions.Python: Fix the JWT validation decorator in auth.py
languageVersions.C++: Fix the token parser in auth_handler.cpp
languageVersions.Java: Fix the AuthFilter class in AuthFilter.java
languageVersions.C: Fix the token validation in auth.c

name: Race Condition in Scheduler
description:
PREVIEW: A race condition in the task scheduler causes duplicate job execution under high concurrency. Locate the missing mutex.
FULL: The task scheduling loop concurrently reads and writes the 'active_task' counter without a global lock, leading to multiple threads picking up the same job ID during high-load bursts.

languageVersions.JavaScript: Fix the async scheduler in scheduler.js
languageVersions.Python: Fix the threading issue in scheduler.py
languageVersions.C++: Fix the mutex lock in scheduler.cpp
languageVersions.Java: Fix the synchronized block in Scheduler.java
languageVersions.C: Fix the pthread mutex in scheduler.c

name: Null Pointer Dereference
description:
PREVIEW: Accessing an uninitialized pointer in the data processing pipeline causes segmentation faults. Find the missing null check.
FULL: The processing function in storage.c assumes the database handle is always connected, dereferencing 'db_ptr' even when a connection failure has occurred, leading to a SIGSEGV.

languageVersions.JavaScript: Fix the null check in processor.js
languageVersions.Python: Fix the None check in processor.py
languageVersions.C++: Fix the nullptr check in processor.cpp
languageVersions.C: Fix the NULL check in processor.c

name: Memory Leak in Galaxy Filter
description:
PREVIEW: The galaxy filter module leaks memory on each render cycle due to unreleased texture buffers. Identify the resource leak.
FULL: The WebGL context in galaxyFilter.js allocates a new buffer for every frame without calling gl.deleteBuffer(), eventually exhausting GPU memory and causing an Out-of-Memory crash.

languageVersions.JavaScript: Fix the buffer cleanup in galaxyFilter.js
languageVersions.Python: Fix the memory management in galaxy_filter.py
languageVersions.Java: Fix the resource cleanup in GalaxyFilter.java
languageVersions.C: Fix the free() calls in galaxy_filter.c

name: Database Recursive Loop
description:
PREVIEW: A self-referencing foreign key creates an infinite recursive query loop when fetching nested comments. Find the loop condition.
FULL: The GET /comments endpoint lacks a recursion depth limit for the parent_id self-join, causing the application to hang when processing circular comment references.

languageVersions.JavaScript: Fix the recursive query in comments.js
languageVersions.Python: Fix the recursive ORM query in comments.py
languageVersions.C++: Fix the recursive SQL builder in comments.cpp
languageVersions.Java: Fix the recursive JPA query in CommentDAO.java
languageVersions.C: Fix the recursive query in comments.c

name: XSS in Search Input
description:
PREVIEW: The search bar does not sanitize user input, allowing script injection via crafted search queries. Find the reflected sink.
FULL: Search queries are directly injected into the DOM via innerHTML in search_results.js without escaping, allowing reflected XSS attacks like ?q=<script>alert(1)</script>.

languageVersions.JavaScript: Fix the input sanitization in search.js
languageVersions.Python: Fix the template escaping in search.py
languageVersions.C++: Fix the HTML encoder in search_handler.cpp
languageVersions.Java: Fix the XSS filter in SearchServlet.java
languageVersions.C: Fix the HTML escape in search.c

name: Integer Overflow in Calculator
description:
PREVIEW: Large number multiplication causes integer overflow leading to incorrect financial calculations. Find the arithmetic error.
FULL: The billing calculation uses a standard 32-bit signed integer for total_cents, which overflows when calculating invoices over ₹21 million, resulting in negative invoice amounts.

languageVersions.JavaScript: Fix the overflow in calculator.js using BigInt
languageVersions.C: Fix the overflow check in calculator.c

name: Deadlock in Connection Pool
description:
PREVIEW: Two threads acquiring connections in opposite order cause a deadlock under peak traffic. Locate the locking conflict.
FULL: The DataLogger and UserSync classes acquire DB locks in reverse alphabetical order, causing a deadlock whenever both processes attempt to run simultaneously during a sync cycle.

languageVersions.JavaScript: Fix the async pool manager in pool.js
languageVersions.Python: Fix the connection pool in pool.py
languageVersions.C++: Fix the lock ordering in ConnectionPool.cpp

name: Cache Invalidation Bug
description:
PREVIEW: Stale cache entries persist after data updates, causing users to see outdated information. Find the broken TTL logic.
FULL: The Redis cache invalidation logic fails to delete keys when a partial UPDATE occurs in the database, relying on a fixed 24-hour expiration that is too long for volatile user data.

languageVersions.JavaScript: Fix the cache invalidation in cache.js
languageVersions.Python: Fix the cache decorator in cache.py
languageVersions.C++: Fix the cache map in CacheManager.cpp
languageVersions.C: Fix the hash map cache in cache.c

name: CORS Misconfiguration
description:
PREVIEW: Wildcard CORS headers allow unauthorized origins. Can you fix the white-list logic?
FULL: The system currently uses 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *' which is highly insecure for authenticated endpoints. You must replace this with a proper domain whitelist check in the middleware layer.

languageVersions.JavaScript: Fix the CORS middleware in server.js
languageVersions.Python: Fix the CORS config in app.py
languageVersions.C++: Fix the CORS headers in server.cpp
languageVersions.C: Fix the CORS headers in http_server.c

name: Average Calculation Logic
description:
PREVIEW: A Python program that calculates the average of numbers contains logical bugs. Can you identify and fix them?
FULL: def calculate_average(numbers):
    total = 0
    for i in range(len(numbers)):
        total += numbers[i]

    average = total / (len(numbers) - 1)
    return average


nums = [10, 20, 30, 40]
print("Average:", calculate_average(nums))

languageVersions.Python: Fix the division error and loop bounds.
